summary: The quote command's pp:happy-args annotation and example date range must stay clearly in the future so the live verify harness never sends past-date getQuotes requests; near-publish-date examples must not be used.
reason: Greptile flagged that pp:happy-args in agent-context drives a live getQuotes call during the Printing Press verify harness, so dates only two days after the publish date would become past dates within a day and could make the smoke test fail; the same literal dates were duplicated across user-facing examples (quote Example, README, SKILL, AGENTS).
validated_outcome: go test/vet/build pass; example date range now sits years ahead of the publish date so live verify quote runs target valid future dates.
